## 怎么验证

- [ ] `python scripts/check_project.py`
- [ ] `python scripts/run_demo_cases.py`
- [ ] `python scripts/check_accuracy_preserving.py`
- [ ] `python scripts/check_final_deliverables.py`
- [ ] `pytest -q`
- [ ] 如涉及 demo，已运行 `python demo/app.py`
- [ ] 没有提交数据/模型大文件
